titleStmt.title: SII 24.249: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 249. (A.R. No. 115 of 1938-39.) EAST WALL OF THE THIRD PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: This record which purports to have emanated from the deity, registers the gift of 48 house-sites to 48 bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by Rāmāṉujaṉ Uḍaiyār, Karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ, Śrīraṅganārāyaṇatādaṉ and other officers, in the month of Chittirai, in the 5th year of Kulaśēkhara. In addition to the house sites, the donees were given 24 dishes of food offerings provided for the services of Poṉmēyṉdāṉ-śandi named after Sundarapāṇḍya of former times and of Kōdaṇḍarāman-śandi instituted after ‘our’ Sundarapāṇḍya as described by the deity. The record states that the village was formed at the ellaikkarai by Karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ of Tīyūr in Miḻalaikkūṟṟam. No. 250 below which is connected with this record adds that this village was founded for the good health of Perumāḷ Sundarapāṇḍya. The settling of fortyeight bhaṭṭas in this village is perhaps an additional arrangement made in the 5th year of the reign of Kulaśēkhara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumukattukkuppaṭi . svasti śrīḥ § Etattrailokyanirmmāṇa trāṇasamhāra kāraṇam . śrīmat śrīraṅganāthasya śāsanam śāśvatam param . nam viṭṭu Ellaik karaiyil nām pūjai koḷḷum veḷḷaimuṟṟam cūḻa pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu tiyūruṭaiyāṉ karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ vaitta Akaram kotaṇṭa rāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku nam kulaśekharanukku tammāsattile taṅkaḷai nāṟpattueṭṭupper koṇṭu taṅkaḷukku Ivviṭu cūḻnta Iṭattile teṉ ciṟakum mel ciṟakum vaṭa ciṟakumāka nāṟpattueṭṭu maṉaiy maṉai Oṉṟukku Oṉṟe kālk kolākak kol Aṟupatu Ikkol Aṟupatum kāṇi Ākak koṇṭu nāṟpattu Eṭṭu maṉaiyum kuṭuttu kuṭi Iruppa kku muṉpu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kaṇṭa poṉmentāṉ canti Eṉṟu perāṉa cantiyi kalattile paṉṉiraṇṭu kalamum Aiñcāvatu kārttikai mātattu nam cuntara kotaṇṭarāmaṉ cantiyile paṉṉiraṇṭu kalamum Ākak kalam Irupattunālum nāṟpatteṭṭup perum peṟavu ttu tāṅkaḷ nammellaik karaiyile Irukkiṟa pala
viṉiyokam Uḷḷatu kaḻittuk kuṭukkavum veṇṭumeṉṟu nam kulacekaraṉu[ kku] Aiñcāvatu cittirai mātattu cittiraik kaṇṇālattu nālāṉāḷ Inta viṭṭu karu māṇikkāḻvāṉ vaiytta karumāṇikkaṉ maṇṭapattile I nikki nam ciraṅkaṇārāyaṇatātaṉum karumāṇikkāḻvāṉum viṭṭuk kovaṇavarum Aṉaittuk kottiluḷḷārum nam rāmāṉujaṉ Uṭaiyārum namakkuc collukaiyil tāṅkaḷ ṉāṟpatteṭṭupperum ṉāṟpatteṭṭu maṉaiyum Eṭuttu kāṇi Ākakkoṇṭu kuṭi Iruntu lattile Irupattuṉālu kalam(p) peṟuvarkaḷākavum Intak kalam ṉokki varum Upātikaḷ tavirkkak kaṭavatākavum Upātikaḷ Uṇṭākil nam rāmāṉujaṉuṭaiyā ṟkkum nam Akampaṭiyāṟkum Uṭala ṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku nam kovaṇavar Eḻuttu Iṭṭa Ōlai peṟak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikku taṅkaḷukkuk kāṇiyāka Inta viṭṭile kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavatākavum coṉṉom Eḻutiṉa tirumantira Ōlai śrīvaiṣṇavapriyaṉ tirumantiraōlai ṉāyaka
tiyūruṭaiyāṉ karumāṇikkāḻvāṉukkum Okkumeṉṟu Iṭṭatu § Iṟaivāḷa kuṭit talaivaṉukkum Okkumeṉṟu Iṭṭatu veḷḷaittirumuṟṟattu sa mahāṉiyogattukkup paṭi §
Digital edition of SII 24.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
